SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest

Class BuildingInfoController

java.lang.Object
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
@RestController public class BuildingInfoController extends Object
REST Controller that provides an interface for managing and querying building information. It handles incoming HTTP requests to process building structures and retrieves calculations from ControllerHelper

  • Field Summary

    Field
    Description

    logger

  • Field Details

    • logger

      public static final org.slf4j.Logger logger
      logger for sending debugging information

  • Constructor Details

    • BuildingInfoController

      public BuildingInfoController(ControllerHelper helper)
      Constructor for helper which store all needed functions for computations This Constructor is used by Spring and is triggered when applications starts
      Parameters:
      helper - helper utility for storing all needed functions for calculation

  • Method Details

    • sendBuilding

      @RequestMapping(value="/building/post", method=POST, produces="application/json") public void sendBuilding(@RequestBody Building building)
      function for accepting building for later access
      Parameters:
      building - input in JSON format of building with levels and rooms (each with id, name and room with additional area, volume, light and heating

    • getMetric

      @RequestMapping(value="/{metric}/{targetID}", method=GET, produces="application/json") public long getMetric(@PathVariable String metric, @PathVariable String targetID)
      Calculates a specific metric for a given location within the building.
      Parameters:
      metric - The type of calculation to perform e.g. "area", "volume", "light".
      targetID - The unique ID of the building, level, or room to analyze in format {buildingID}-{levelID}-{roomID}, with level and room ID being optional
      Returns:
      The calculated value as a long.

    • getExceedingHeating

      @RequestMapping(value="/overheating/{parameter}", method=GET, produces="application/json") public String getExceedingHeating(@PathVariable long parameter)
      Generates a report of rooms that exceed a specified heating threshold.
      Parameters:
      parameter - The heating limit used to identify overheated rooms(threshold).
      Returns:
      A JSON-formatted string report of rooms exceeding the limit.
